title: Wide Blade Tape Measure
summary: Wide blade tape measure supplier for construction and hardware buyers, with ergonomic case, stable blade extension, custom logo, shell color, packaging, and OEM specification support.
sellingPoints: Wide blade for stable standout performance
OEM logo, color and packaging options

specs.label: Material
specs.value: High-carbon steel tape, ABS shell, nylon lanyard, stainless steel hook, belt clip

specs.label: Customization
specs.value: Custom logo sticker and Pantone color accepted

specs.label: MOQ
specs.value: Flexible MOQ, to be confirmed by order details

specs.label: Lead time
specs.value: Custom logo samples ready in about 3 days. Bulk lead time can be negotiated based on order quantity and packaging requirements.

quality: Blade standout and retraction performance test
Hook strength and lock function inspection

Packaging, barcode label and carton mark review
